hook: Ho visto che siete un provider cloud e cybersecurity con accreditamento ACN e certificazioni ISO: mi interessa capire dove la raccolta evidenze NIS2/GDPR resta manuale per voi o per i vostri partner.
notes: Company-level candidate. Find CTO/CISO/DPO or partner/compliance owner before sending.
next_action: Verify named contact and whether this is customer or channel-partner outreach.

hook: Ho visto cloud services certificati ISO 27001/27017/27018 e qualificati ACN: Splnit.eu potrebbe essere utile dove i clienti chiedono evidenze continue per NIS2 e GDPR.
notes: Company-level candidate. Contact and headcount need verification.
next_action: Verify headcount and identify security/compliance decision maker.

hook: Ho visto il vostro posizionamento MSP con DNA cybersecurity e focus PMI: mi interessa capire quanto i questionari NIS2/ISO dei clienti stanno pesando sul delivery.
notes: Company-level candidate. Likely good discovery target for MSP/channel perspective.
next_action: Verify headcount and find founder/CTO or security lead.

hook: Ho visto managed services, cloud, cybersecurity e certificazione ISO 27001: vorrei capire dove oggi raccogliete evidenze per audit e clienti enterprise.
notes: Company-level candidate. Public site indicates MSP/cloud/cybersecurity fit.
next_action: Verify headcount and identify IT/security/compliance owner.

hook: Ho visto ISO 27001/27017/27018, SOC e Cloud & Cybersecurity Voucher: potrebbe essere interessante confrontarsi su evidenze NIS2 per PMI strutturate.
notes: Company-level candidate. Could be customer, partner, or advisor interview.
next_action: Verify headcount and find security/commercial owner.

hook: Ho visto il repository sanitario e il riferimento a NIS2/ISO 27001 per dati sanitari: mi interessa capire quali evidenze servono a chi vende software in sanità.
notes: Company-level candidate. Strong regulated-healthcare software signal.
next_action: Verify headcount and identify CTO/security/privacy owner.

hook: Ho visto salute digitale, dispositivo medico software e sistema qualità con ISO 27001/13485: vorrei capire quanto audit e GDPR/NIS2 pesano nella roadmap.
notes: Company-level candidate. May be smaller than target; still useful regulated healthtech discovery.
next_action: Verify headcount before sending; find founder/CTO/DPO.

hook: Ho visto MSP cybersecurity con SOC e riferimenti espliciti a NIS2 e ISO 27001: mi interessa capire quali evidenze ripetitive servono ai vostri clienti.
notes: Company-level candidate. Good MSP/channel discovery signal.
next_action: Verify headcount and identify security/compliance owner.

hook: Ho visto servizi NIS2, ISO 27001 e GDPR con SOC/NOC e certificazione ISO 27001: vorrei confrontarmi su automazione evidenze e gap analysis.
notes: Company-level candidate. Could be partner-oriented more than end-customer.
next_action: Verify headcount and named contact before outreach.

hook: Ho visto PA expertise, ACN Qualified e consulenza NIS2/ISO 27001: mi interessa capire dove la documentazione compliance resta troppo manuale.
notes: Company-level candidate. May be larger or partner-oriented; verify before sending.
next_action: Verify company size and find security/compliance decision maker.

hook: Ho visto che Mia-Platform serve anche healthcare, banking, energy e platform engineering: mi interessa capire come gestite evidenze compliance e audit trail nei progetti enterprise.
notes: Direct SaaS/platform candidate with regulated-industry customers. Contact owner must be precise before outreach.
next_action: Find CTO/security/compliance/platform governance owner; verify current headcount.

hook: Ho visto il posizionamento NIS2, GDPR, ISO 27001 e localizzazione del dato: vorrei capire quali evidenze chiedono clienti e partner quando valutano storage sovrano.
notes: Direct cloud/storage candidate and possible ecosystem interview.
next_action: Verify current headcount and find security/compliance or product owner.

hook: Ho visto Industrial IoT per manifattura, energia e logistica con oltre 150 clienti: mi interessa capire quanto NIS2 e security evidence emergono nei progetti di fabbrica connessa.
notes: Below target headcount but strong manufacturing/energy discovery signal.
next_action: Verify whether to treat as design partner or learning interview; find CTO/security owner.

hook: Ho visto piattaforma Industrial IoT, AI software e certificazione ISO 27001: mi interessa capire come documentate sicurezza e conformità nei progetti con OEM e impianti connessi.
notes: Direct industrial software candidate; source includes ISO 27001 certificate.
next_action: Verify headcount and identify CTO/security/product owner.

hook: Ho visto software cartella clinica, ambulatori e medicina del lavoro con certificazione ISO 27001: vorrei capire quali evidenze GDPR e sicurezza servono ai clienti sanitari.
notes: Strong health software signal; likely sensitive-data workflow.
next_action: Verify headcount and find founder/CTO/privacy owner.

hook: Ho visto software per la sanità con certificazioni ISO 9001 e ISO 13485: mi interessa capire quanto audit privacy e sicurezza incidono nella vendita a strutture sanitarie.
notes: Search-result source only; site fetch returned 502 during research. Do not send until manually verified.
next_action: Recheck website and headcount; find CTO/quality/privacy owner.

hook: Ho visto Lead Auditor ISO 27001, NIS2 e focus su evidenze e controlli misurabili: potrebbe essere utile confrontarsi su cosa resta manuale nei progetti compliance per PMI.
notes: Good advisor/channel learning target more than direct buyer.
next_action: Verify size and decide whether advisor/channel interview is better.

hook: Ho visto ISMS per requisiti NIS2, ISO 27001 e focus PMI: mi interessa capire quali parti della raccolta evidenze sono più difficili da rendere scalabili.
notes: Potential competitor or partner; use as learning/channel target, not first direct customer unless fit is clear.
next_action: Verify contact and whether outreach angle should be partner/advisor.

hook: Ho visto Comprova e servizi NIS2 per PMI: mi interessa confrontarmi su come i piccoli team stanno trasformando D.Lgs. 138/2024 in controlli ed evidenze pratiche.
notes: Likely small/early company; useful competitive/learning signal, not necessarily ICP.
next_action: Verify size; decide if this is ecosystem interview rather than design partner.

hook: Ho visto SOC, remediation, backup e compliance continua ISO 27001/NIS2: vorrei capire come trasformate monitoraggio operativo in evidenze audit-ready.
notes: Good SOC/evidence learning target.
next_action: Verify company entity/headcount and identify security/product owner.
